title: Integrate fabric-ai into oilcloth
description:
Enable oilcloth to use fabric patterns, especially YouTube extraction.

## Phase 1: Container Integration (current)
- Add fabric binary to container image
- Install yt-dlp for YouTube transcript extraction
- Mount ~/.config/fabric for patterns and API config
- Create MCP tool for fabric calls

## Phase 2: REST API (future)
- Run fabric --serve as systemd service
- Expose to multiple agents (not just oilcloth)
- Investigate fabric-mcp for cleaner integration

## Key Use Cases
- YouTube video summarization (extract_wisdom, youtube_summary)
- Content analysis patterns (summarize, extract_ideas, etc.)
- 237 patterns available

## References
- https://github.com/danielmiessler/fabric
- https://github.com/ksylvan/fabric-mcp
close_reason: Phase 1 complete: fabric integrated into container with MCP tools

title: Realtime NanoClaw Dashboard
description: Simple dashboard to see what oilcloth is doing in real-time. Show incoming messages, agent activity, responses sent.

title: Terminal dashboard UI
description: Web-based dashboard UI. Simple HTML/CSS/JS page showing: incoming messages, current agent status, outgoing responses. Served from nanoclaw itself or separate lightweight server.

title: Log streaming from systemd
description: Capture and parse journalctl output for nanoclaw service. Extract message events, container starts, responses.

title: Container activity monitor
description: Show when Docker containers spin up/down for agent runs. Display duration and status.

title: OSINT Capability for oilcloth
description:
Build OSINT intelligence gathering capabilities for oilcloth.

## Goals
- Username enumeration across platforms
- Content aggregation (Lemmy, Digg)
- Phone/email lookup
- Fabric integration for content processing

## Approach
- Knowledge-based methodology (teach oilcloth techniques)
- Script library for reliable lookups
- Fabric patterns for processing

## Resources
- Rae Baker's OSINT tools guide
- Fabric framework
- Bellingcat/Bazzell methodology

See docs/OSINT-PLANNING.md for full planning document.

title: Username enumeration system
description:
Build username search capability using WhatsMyName.app and similar tools.

- API integration or scraping approach
- Cross-reference results
- Handle false positives
- Output structured report

title: Lemmy/Digg content aggregation
description:
Build content search across federated platforms.

- Query multiple Lemmy instances
- Check new Digg API/RSS
- Aggregate and dedupe results
- Format for easy consumption

title: Phone/email lookup tools
description:
Integrate public record lookup capabilities.

- Epieos for email → account discovery
- Phone carrier lookup (NumVerify or similar)
- HaveIBeenPwned integration
- Holehe for email site checks

title: Fabric integration
description:
Install Fabric and create OSINT-specific patterns.

- Install Fabric in container or as external tool
- Create patterns: extract_entities, verify_claim, summarize_profile
- Test with real content

title: OSINT knowledge base for oilcloth
description:
Create methodology documentation that oilcloth can reference.

- Verification techniques (Bellingcat style)
- Tool usage guides
- Best practices
- Legal/ethical boundaries
